title: Ladies of The Nile- سيدات النيل
description: “Ladies of the Nile” highlights the journey of Egyptian women who turned water hyacinths into beautiful handicrafts.

title: People of Quorsaya
description: An exceptional community is on an Island in the middle of the Nile River.

title: Descendants of Olive
description: The heritage and future of the Olive Descendants, emphasizing unity and strength.

title: Ladies of the palace
description: "Ladies of the Palace" unveils the harsh realities of homeless women.

title: Ahl Al Kaaby - أهل الكعبي
description: Al-Kaaby, a village in El Fayoum, where the art of palm fiber crafts is on the verge of fading away.

title: Hallawela - حلاويلا
description: Meet the members of Barsha Theatre troupe in Minya, Egypt.

title: Desert Rain - غيث الصحراء
description: An interesting journey to the northern coast of Egypt, where water is precious.
